title: SSV MIDWAY SR-2 // INBOX

messages.subject: Welcome aboard
messages.body: Your quarters are assigned and your terminal access is live. See me if anything's amiss.

messages.subject: Pre-mission medical check
messages.body: All Security personnel report to med-bay for clearance before the next drop. No exceptions.

_note: Threaded mail. messages[] are flat: each has threadId (shared across a thread) and inReplyTo (parent msg id, null for a thread root). The root message carries the subject; replies omit it. Thread read-state lives in threads{ '<threadId>': { read:[memberId,...] } } — members caught up on the thread. wt = sortable in-world time. Sample: thread msg-001 ('Welcome aboard', byas->matthews) has a reply msg-003 (matthews->byas); threads.msg-001.read=[matthews] so byas sees it unread. msg-002 is a standalone thread (voss->Security). Anchored to ref now=69009558720. threads[].deleted = member ids who moved the thread to their Trash (parallel to read). A reply removes its recipients from deleted (resurfaces it). GM view ignores deleted.
